_source: I2 Localization (data.unity3d) via community SandTools extract

item_sniperRifleAmmo.name: 11x54 mm Ammo
item_sniperRifleAmmo.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 11 mm
Suitable for: Heavy rifles
item_sniperRifleAmmo.desc: Basic ammo used by long-range rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_sniperRifleAmmo_highPenetration.name: 11x54 mm AP Ammo
item_sniperRifleAmmo_highPenetration.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 11 mm
Suitable for: Heavy rifles
Features: Armor-piercing
item_sniperRifleAmmo_highPenetration.desc: Special armor-piercing ammo with a hardened penetrating core. Used with long-range rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_shotgunAmmo.name: 12 GA Ammo
item_shotgunAmmo.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
item_shotgunAmmo.desc: Basic buckshot ammo used by all shotguns. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_shotgunAmmo_explosive.name: 12 GA Buckshot Ammo (HE)
item_shotgunAmmo_explosive.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Explodes on impact
item_shotgunAmmo_explosive.desc: Explosive buckshot ammo. Buckshot pellets are filled with an explosive mixture. Extraordinary efforts led to an impressive result. Manufactured by Kaiser's Friends.

item_shotgunAmmo_Fire.name: 12 GA Dragon's Breath Ammo
item_shotgunAmmo_Fire.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Incendiary
item_shotgunAmmo_Fire.desc: Incendiary buckshot ammo. Buckshot pellets are mixed with highly flammable materials. A prototype made by Neue Zukunft.

item_shotgunAmmo_Armor.name: 12 GA Heavy Buckshot Ammo
item_shotgunAmmo_Armor.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Armor-piercing
item_shotgunAmmo_Armor.desc: Special buckshot ammo used by all shotguns. Bigger pellets make it more effective against armor. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_shotgunAmmo_slug.name: 12 GA Shotgun Slug
item_shotgunAmmo_slug.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Single slug
item_shotgunAmmo_slug.desc: Experimental ammunition that uses a single solid bullet instead of buckshot, which significantly increases lethality. Designed for hunting very large animals. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_shotgunAmmo_Toxic.name: 12 GA Toxic Ammo
item_shotgunAmmo_Toxic.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Toxic
item_shotgunAmmo_Toxic.desc: Special buckshot ammo. Buckshot pellets are mixed with highly toxic materials provided by Sophie's Molfars.

item_shotgunTurretAmmo_slug.name: 70 mm Shotgun Cannon Slug
item_shotgunTurretAmmo_slug.short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 70 mm
Suitable for: Shotgun cannons
Features: Single slug
item_shotgunTurretAmmo_slug.desc: Armor-piercing ammunition with a solid shell, designed for use with 70 mm shotgun cannons. It can't compete with 80 mm long-barreled artillery shells, but without those – beggars can't be choosers.

item_pistolAmmo.name: 8x21 mm Ammo
item_pistolAmmo.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
item_pistolAmmo.desc: Basic ammo used by most small firearms. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_pistolAmmo_Armor.name: 8x21 mm FMJ Ammo
item_pistolAmmo_Armor.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
Features: Armor-piercing
item_pistolAmmo_Armor.desc: Special ammo used by most small firearms. Its full metal jacket makes it highly effective against armor. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_pistolAmmo_highVelocity.name: 8x21 mm HV Ammo
item_pistolAmmo_highVelocity.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
Features: Increased velocity
item_pistolAmmo_highVelocity.desc: Special high-velocity ammo used by most small firearms. Its increased powder charge makes bullets fly faster compared to standard ammunition. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_pistolAmmo_Fire.name: 8x21 mm Incendiary Ammo
item_pistolAmmo_Fire.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
Features: Incendiary
item_pistolAmmo_Fire.desc: Special ammo used by most small firearms. Contains highly flammable materials inside. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_pistolAmmo_Toxic.name: 8x21 mm Toxic Ammo
item_pistolAmmo_Toxic.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
Features: Toxic
item_pistolAmmo_Toxic.desc: Special ammo used by most small firearms. Contains highly toxic materials provided by Sophie's Molfars.

item_rifleAmmo.name: 9x42 mm Ammo
item_rifleAmmo.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
item_rifleAmmo.desc: Ammo that is used by most infantry rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_rifleAmmo_Armor.name: 9x42 mm FMJ Ammo
item_rifleAmmo_Armor.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
Features: Armor-piercing
item_rifleAmmo_Armor.desc: Special ammo for basic infantry rifles. Its full metal jacket makes it highly effective against armor. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_rifleAmmo_highVelocity.name: 9x42 mm HV Ammo
item_rifleAmmo_highVelocity.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
Features: Increased velocity
item_rifleAmmo_highVelocity.desc: Special high-velocity ammo for basic infantry rifles. Increased powder charge makes bullets fly faster compared to standard ammunition. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_rifleAmmo_Fire.name: 9x42 mm Incendiary Ammo
item_rifleAmmo_Fire.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
Features: Incendiary
item_rifleAmmo_Fire.desc: Special ammo for basic infantry rifles. Contains highly flammable materials inside. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_rifleAmmo_Toxic.name: 9x42 mm Toxic Ammo
item_rifleAmmo_Toxic.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
Features: Toxic
item_rifleAmmo_Toxic.desc: Special ammo for basic infantry rifles. Contains highly toxic materials inside. Manufactured by SGOW.

item_rocketLauncherAmmoArmorPiercing.name: Armor-Piercing Rocket
item_rocketLauncherAmmoArmorPiercing.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: Rocket
Suitable for: Rocket launchers
Features: Increased damage against tramplers
item_rocketLauncherAmmoArmorPiercing.desc: An unofficial rocket for the RW1 rocket launcher, handmade by someone very resourceful. Packs a punch, but is ineffective against infantry.

item_turretAmmo_highVelocity.name: High Velocity 80 mm Shell
item_turretAmmo_highVelocity.short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
Features: Increased velocity
item_turretAmmo_highVelocity.desc: A modification of standard artillery shells, compatible with naval cannons. Increased initial projectile velocity, made possible by a revised powder charge formula.

item_rocketLauncherAmmoHighExplosion.name: High-Explosive Rocket
item_rocketLauncherAmmoHighExplosion.short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: Rocket
Suitable for: Rocket Launchers
Features: Increased damage against infantry
item_rocketLauncherAmmoHighExplosion.desc: An unofficial rocket for the RW1 rocket launcher, handmade by someone very resourceful. Not effective against armor, but capable of inflicting significant damage to infantry in a fairly large radius.

item_smallCannonAmmo_longRange.name: Long-Range 40 mm Shell
item_smallCannonAmmo_longRange.short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 40 mm
Suitable for: Autocannons
Features: Increased range
item_smallCannonAmmo_longRange.desc: A smaller-caliber cannon shell utilized by autocannons. Contains increased powder charge to increase range.

Old_Jacket.name: Old Smuggler's Jacket
Old_Jacket.short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 1
Features: Regenerates over time
Old_Jacket.desc: The leather is sturdy enough to save you from a shot or two.

Old_JacketT2.name: SGOW SW.52 Body Armor (decommissioned)
Old_JacketT2.short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 2
Features: Regenerates over time
Old_JacketT2.desc: A well-worn breastplate, quilted jacket, and stylish belt – it immediately becomes clear that the wearer is not only ready for battle, but has already been through many.

Old_JacketT3.name: SGOW SW.73 Light Armor
Old_JacketT3.short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 3
Features: Regenerates over time
Old_JacketT3.desc: The standard armor of combat sailors and field officers of the Kaiser's fleet. The breastplate can reflect even the sun's rays. In it, you will be the most stylish Galician <s>marauder</s> scientist of all! And definitely the most resilient.

item_projectileSphereShield.name: Domovyk Protective Dome
item_projectileSphereShield.short:
Type: Experimental Equipment
Purpose: Defensive
Action: Stops bullets and shells fired from outside
Features: One-time use
item_projectileSphereShield.desc: A portable protection station. When activated, generates a magnetic field designed to slow or even stop any physical objects moving into it at high velocity. Won't stop a human or a trampler, but works well against harsh environmental conditions such as bullets and projectiles. Included in the standard set of pioneer equipment.

item_grenadeContact.name: HG-6 Contact Grenade
item_grenadeContact.short:
Type: Grenade
Fuse: Contact
Damage: High
item_grenadeContact.desc: A single-use hand grenade – or a reusable mace. Fragile. Handle with care.

item_projectileAmplifier.name: Pestkop Lorenz Amplifier
item_projectileAmplifier.short:
Type: Experimental Equipment
Purpose: Offensive
Action: Increases the damage of bullets and shells fired from the inside
Features: One-time use
item_projectileAmplifier.desc: A portable amplifier station. When activated, it generates an electromagnetic field. Metal objects that have started moving inside the field receive an additional charge, which, for example, significantly increases the damage from bullets and shells. Initially developed to protect against harmful radiation, in practice, it has also proven useful in a somewhat opposite way.

item_smokeGrenade.name: RG79s Smoke Grenade
item_smokeGrenade.short:
Type: Grenade
Fuse: Contact
Features: Lots of smoke
item_smokeGrenade.desc: A disposable source of black smoke. Whether it will be a decoy, signal, or disguise is up to you. Handle with care.

item_projectileDeflectShield.name: Von Liebig Reflector
item_projectileDeflectShield.short:
Type: Experimental Equipment
Purpose: Defensive
Action: Reflects bullets and shells fired from outside
Features: One-time use
item_projectileDeflectShield.desc: Deflects projectiles in the direction it was pointed when activated. The result of experiments involving aurogen in the mirror-manufacturing process.

item_backpack01.name: Backpack
item_backpack01.short:
Type: Gear
Purpose: Extra space to carry things hands-free
Capacity: X slots
item_backpack01.desc: Your adventure companion: holds everything from guns to treasures!

item_boostedEnergyBar.name: NZ Mk1 Modified Energy Rod
item_boostedEnergyBar.short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
Features: Short-term increase in trampler speed (low)
item_boostedEnergyBar.desc:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
Makes your trampler go really fast for a short time thanks to the modernization of the valve system, which gives the motor-reactor a short burst of extra energy right after the rod is activated.

item_energyBar.name: NZ Mk2 Energy Rod
item_energyBar.short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
item_energyBar.desc: Your main source of energy. Put it in your reactor to keep the trampler working.

item_smokelessEnergyBar.name: NZ Mk2-RF Smokeless Energy Rod
item_smokelessEnergyBar.short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
Features: Hides smoke from the trampler's motor-reactor (temporarily)
item_smokelessEnergyBar.desc:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
A covert ops version that can cause the motor-reactor to stop emitting visible smoke for quite a long period of time.

item_boostedEnergyBarV1.name: NZ Mk2a Enriched Energy Rod
item_boostedEnergyBarV1.short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
Features: Short-term increase in trampler speed (average)
item_boostedEnergyBarV1.desc:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
Makes your trampler go pretty fast for a short time thanks to the improved structure of the aurogen, which gives the motor-reactor a short burst of extra energy right after the rod is activated.

item_foodCan.name: Canned Food
item_foodCan.short:
Type: Food
Features:
- When consumed, regenerates health;
- When placed in the trampler's fridge or other storage, allows for quick respawning
item_foodCan.desc: The amount of food on board the trampler determines the number of quick respawns available for the Crew. You also can just eat it to improve your well-being.

game_keyIslandDoorBlack.name: Black Key
game_keyIslandDoorBlack.short:
Type: Key
Suitable for: Black doors
Features: One-time use

The tag text is decorated with military emblems and states: "Kaiser Fleet's Flagship, The Great _________, Admiral's Quarters".
game_keyIslandDoorBlack.desc:
Opens something marked with black. Looks important.
The tag text is decorated with military emblems and states: "Kaiser Fleet's Flagship, The Great _________, Admiral's Quarters".

game_keyIslandDoorBlue.name: Blue Key
game_keyIslandDoorBlue.short:
Type: Key
Suitable for: Blue doors
Features: One-time use

The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "Franz's S_o_age _ut, Me_e__s__g_ fi__in_ vi_l__e"
game_keyIslandDoorBlue.desc:
Opens something marked with blue, but what exactly?
The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "Franz's S_o_age _ut, Me_e__s__g_ fi__in_ vi_l__e".

game_keyLockedBox.name: Box Key
game_keyLockedBox.short:
Type: Key
Suitable for: Locked boxes and crates
Features: One-time use
game_keyLockedBox.desc: Looks suitable for a small lock, like those used on chests or boxes.

game_keyIslandDoorFort.name: Fort Storage Room Key
game_keyIslandDoorFort.short:
Type: Key
Suitable for: Storage room doors
Features: One-time use
game_keyIslandDoorFort.desc: All district officers had this master key. Can open storage rooms in almost any fort.

game_keyIslandDoorGreen.name: Green Key
game_keyIslandDoorGreen.short:
Type: Key
Suitable for: Green doors
Features: One-time use

The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "Chi_f Dis_r_ct Ac_o_nt_nt's Office, K__s__pl__ isla_d".
game_keyIslandDoorGreen.desc:
Opens something marked with green, but what exactly?
The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "Chi_f Dis_r_ct Ac_o_nt_nt's Office, K__s__pl__ isla_d".

game_keyIslandDoorRed.name: Red Key
game_keyIslandDoorRed.short:
Type: Key
Suitable for: Red doors
Features: One-time use

The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "C__ef I__er_al M__it_ry A_chi__ct's Offi_e, S___n isl__d".
game_keyIslandDoorRed.desc:
Opens something marked with red, but what exactly?
The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "C__ef I__er_al M__it_ry A_chi__ct's Offi_e, S___n isl__d".

game_keyIslandDoorWhite.name: White Key
game_keyIslandDoorWhite.short:
Type: Key
Suitable for: White doors
Features: One-time use

The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "F__t I__ri_ Dis_ri_t Of__e_'s Wor__h_p".
game_keyIslandDoorWhite.desc:
Opens something marked with white, but what exactly?
The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "F__t I__ri_ Dis_ri_t Of__e_'s Wor___o_p".

item_blackBox.name: Black Box
item_blackBox.short:
Type: Trip Data Recorder
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_blackBox.desc: Incredibly valuable proof of your victory over someone.

game_alarmLockBoxYellow.name: Box with Radio Beacon
game_alarmLockBoxYellow.short:
Type: Crate
Purpose: May contain lots of useful things
Features: Requires a key; equipped with an alarm system

game_alarmLockBoxGreen.name: Box with Radio Beacon
game_alarmLockBoxGreen.short:
Type: Crate
Purpose: May contain lots of useful things
Features: Requires a key; equipped with alarm system

game_alarmLockBoxBlack.name: Box with Radio Beacon
game_alarmLockBoxBlack.short:
Type: Crate
Purpose: May contain lots of useful things
Features: Requires a key; equipped with an alarm system

item_cannedFish.name: Canned Sea Deer XL
item_cannedFish.short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading, Tech Tree
item_cannedFish.desc: An XL-sized can of the famous Sea Deer, an exotic fish discovered by Sophie's first colonists.

item_wineBox.name: Crate of 1889 Chardonnay
item_wineBox.short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_wineBox.desc: Wine from Sophie's best vineyards. It is well bought by snobs in Vienna.

item_documentSafe.name: District Officer's Portable Safe
item_documentSafe.short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading, Tech Tree
item_documentSafe.desc: A safe that contains something very valuable that belonged to the District Officer. Considering how bureaucratic the Austro-Hungarians are, it's probably a bunch of documents.

item_ficus.name: Ficus
item_ficus.short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading and Tech Tree
Features: Does not fit on cargo compartment shelves. Evacuation to orbit is possible only while held in-hand. Very delicate and fragile.

item_crystalHandles.name: Raw Aurogen Crystal
item_crystalHandles.short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree

Features: Hazardous radiation
item_crystalHandles.desc: A fragment of a strange crystal, ready for transport. Caution – radiation hazard.

item_coinCrown.name: Crowns
item_coinCrown.short:
Type: Money
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
item_coinCrown.desc: The main currency here. Has a familiar face on it.

item_c4Dynamite.name: Time Bomb
item_c4Dynamite.short:
Type: Explosives
Fuse: Clockwork
Damage: Moderate
item_c4Dynamite.desc: An incredibly serious argument that can open a lot of doors for you. Make sure to activate it before running away.

item_explosiveBig.name: Wok Bomb
item_explosiveBig.short:
Type: Explosives
Fuse: Clockwork
Damage: Absolute
item_explosiveBig.desc: A sea mine cooked up according to a secret Molfar recipe, with the addition of local coral dust, a pinch of aurogen, and a countdown clock. Served inactivated. Once activated, an explosion is inevitable.

item_wokBomb.name: Wok Bomb
item_wokBomb.short:
Type: Explosives
Fuse: Clockwork
Damage: Absolute
item_wokBomb.desc: A sea mine cooked up according to a secret Molfar recipe, with the addition of local coral dust, a pinch of aurogen, and a countdown clock. Served inactivated. Once activated, an explosion is inevitable. Extremely powerful!

item_resourceCoralPiece.name: Coral Chunk
item_resourceCoralPiece.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceCoralPiece.desc: One of the most common souvenirs brought by tourists from Sophie, it is a fairly valuable resource required in the production of some items.

item_resourceFabricScraps.name: Fabric Scraps
item_resourceFabricScraps.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceFabricScraps.desc: Various pieces of fabric and leather, mostly remnants of clothing, tents, carpets, curtains and even sails, left long ago in the harsh desert climate. However, some look quite new.

item_resourceMetal_t1.name: Mechanical Parts
item_resourceMetal_t1.short:
Type: Spare Parts
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
item_resourceMetal_t1.desc: Commonly used parts in heavy-duty machinery.

item_resourceMetalParts.name: Scrap Metal
item_resourceMetalParts.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceMetalParts.desc: Various parts – anything made from metal – gathered into one pile.

item_resourceScrappedAmmo.name: Scrapped Ammo
item_resourceScrappedAmmo.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceScrappedAmmo.desc: This ammo will likely blow up in your hands or won't work at all if you try to use it. But the materials from it can still be salvaged and repurposed.

item_resourceThreads.name: Threads
item_resourceThreads.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceThreads.desc: A basic spool of thread used by anyone.

item_resourceCoralDust.name: Coral Dust
item_resourceCoralDust.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceCoralDust.desc: Rare subspecies of local coral, additionally cleaned and ground into powder. Widely used in military and pharmaceutical fields.

item_resourceFabric.name: Fabric
item_resourceFabric.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceFabric.desc: Usually a common material, but not in this case: over the years, most local fabric items have either crumbled to dust or are beyond salvage.

item_resourceGunpowder.name: Gunpowder
item_resourceGunpowder.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceGunpowder.desc: Standard military gunpowder. Not of the best quality due to cheap components, nevertheless sufficient for mass production. Used for most conventional military ammunition.

item_resourceLeviathanMeat.name: Leviathan Meat
item_resourceLeviathanMeat.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceLeviathanMeat.desc: The lump of meat of a mysterious creature that lurks beneath the sands. But where's the carcass?

item_resourceLeviathanSkin.name: Leviathan Skin
item_resourceLeviathanSkin.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceLeviathanSkin.desc: A piece of skin that, by its texture, is reminiscent of a snake's skin but, by the looks of it, this piece belonged to something way bigger that a snake.

item_resourceMetalRods.name: Metal Rods
item_resourceMetalRods.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceMetalRods.desc: High-quality metal forged into rods – ready for use and easy to transport.

item_resourceMixtures.name: Mixtures
item_resourceMixtures.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceMixtures.desc: Various mixtures, syrups, tinctures and pills that were widely available for practically anyone on Sophie.

item_resourceMetal_t2.name: Pneumatic Parts
item_resourceMetal_t2.short:
Type: Spare Parts
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
item_resourceMetal_t2.desc: Crucial elements in more sophisticated machinery.

item_resourceWeaponParts.name: Weapon Parts
item_resourceWeaponParts.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceWeaponParts.desc: Receivers, spare barrels, gas tubes and other replaceable parts of regular military weapons.

item_resourceMetal_t3.name: Computing Module
item_resourceMetal_t3.short:
Type: Spare Parts
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
item_resourceMetal_t3.desc: These parts were used in the most technological marvels created by the brightest minds of the Empire.

item_resourceHighGradeGunpowder.name: High-Grade Gunpowder
item_resourceHighGradeGunpowder.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceHighGradeGunpowder.desc: The new smokeless gunpowder recipe, discovered on Sophie. The Imperial forces combined their regular gunpowder with coral dust, resulting in a powder that lasted longer and produced much less smoke.

item_resourceOpticLenses.name: Optic Lenses
item_resourceOpticLenses.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceOpticLenses.desc: These lenses were used everywhere: from rifle and gun sights to eyeglasses and binoculars. Due to their fragile structure, there are not many left on Sophie, so they are considered very valuable.

item_resourceReinforcedLeatherStrips.name: Reinforced Leather Strips
item_resourceReinforcedLeatherStrips.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
item_resourceReinforcedLeatherStrips.desc: Strips of leather sewn with fabric are a fairly durable material used to make uniforms, shoulder pads, and body armor for imperial troops.

item_smallValuables.name: Small Valuables
item_smallValuables.desc: Some valuable knick-knacks left behind by the previous residents during the evacuation.

item_valuablePapers.name: Valuable Papers
item_valuablePapers.desc: These papers might contain some information that can be sold to someone.

item_smallCannonAmmo.name: 40 mm Shell
item_smallCannonAmmo.short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 40 mm
Suitable for: Autocannons
item_smallCannonAmmo.desc: A smaller-caliber cannon shell utilized by autocannons.

item_shotgunTurretAmmo.name: 70 mm Shell
item_shotgunTurretAmmo.short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 70 mm
Suitable for: Shotgun Cannons
item_shotgunTurretAmmo.desc: Canister shot that contains a high number of small projectiles. Utilized by shotgun cannons.

item_turretAmmo.name: 80 mm Shell
item_turretAmmo.short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
item_turretAmmo.desc: A regular type of shell utilized by Naval Cannons.

MedKit.name: MedKit
MedKit.short:
Type: Medical Supplies
Purpose: Quick restoration of health
Features: Allows for full restoration
MedKit.desc: Whether it's a critical wound or a small scratch, the MedKit will fix it in no time.

item_healthEmitter.name: Podorozhnyk Bio-Emitter
item_healthEmitter.short:
Type: Experimental Equipment
Purpose: Defensive
Action: Regenerates health of all living beings within range
Features: One-time use
item_healthEmitter.desc: A portable medical station. When activated, generates a healing field capable of mending wounds and restoring health. A prototype. Short-term action. Will not protect against fatal injuries.

RepairKit.name: Repair Kit
RepairKit.desc: If you've noticed that your trampler has more holes than it has walls, this is the right tool to use.

item_treasureShovel.name: Rusty Shovel
item_treasureShovel.short:
Type: Tool
Purpose: Dig up treasures
Features: One-time use
item_treasureShovel.desc: This shovel is in terrible condition and literally falls apart in your hands. However, according to the accounting journals, it seems that funds for its repair and maintenance were regularly allocated by the foreman.

item_sniperRifle_ironSights.name: 1874e Petros Rifle
item_sniperRifle_ironSights.short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
item_sniperRifle_ironSights.desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm bolt-action rifle. Simple, reliable, and very accurate. Every shot counts that much more when you only have one shot available.

item_sniperRifle_ironSights_silencer.name: 1874e/sd Petros Rifle (Silenced)
item_sniperRifle_ironSights_silencer.short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Silencer
item_sniperRifle_ironSights_silencer.desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm bolt-action rifle. Simple, reliable, and very accurate. Equipped with a silencer. A handy tool to surprise your opponent with.

item_sniperRifle.name: 1874s Petros Sniper Rifle
item_sniperRifle.short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Telescopic sight
item_sniperRifle.desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight. Every shot counts that much more when you only have one shot available.

item_sniperRifle_silencer.name: 1874s/sd Petros Sniper Rifle (Silenced)
item_sniperRifle_silencer.short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Telescopic sight and silencer
item_sniperRifle_silencer.desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight and a silencer. A handy tool to surprise your opponent with.

item_sniperRifleDoubleBarrel.name: 1887/2 "The Twin" Double-Barreled Rifle
item_sniperRifleDoubleBarrel.short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 2 rounds
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Double-barreled
item_sniperRifleDoubleBarrel.desc: Bartka's "The Twin" 11 mm double-barreled sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight. It's always nice to have a second chance. Even if it's rarely needed, given the power of each shot.

item_semiAutomaticPistol.name: Blitz 10R Pistol
item_semiAutomaticPistol.short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Pistol
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 10 rounds
Range: Medium
Reloading speed: High
item_semiAutomaticPistol.desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. Highly effective in close quarters. Compensates for its low accuracy with a high fire rate.

item_semiAutomaticPistol_increasedMag.name: Blitz 15R Pistol
item_semiAutomaticPistol_increasedMag.short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Pistol
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 15 rounds
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: High
item_semiAutomaticPistol_increasedMag.desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. A rare modification with an increased capacity magazine, capable of holding 15 rounds. Even more bullets to miss the target with.

item_semiAutomaticPistol_decreasedMag.name: Blitz PPS-5 Pistol
item_semiAutomaticPistol_decreasedMag.short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Pistol
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 5 rounds
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: High
item_semiAutomaticPistol_decreasedMag.desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. A preproduction sample with a reduced capacity magazine capable of holding five rounds.

item_shotgunHandmade.name: Drobulet Shotgun
item_shotgunHandmade.short:
Type: Shotgun
Caliber: 12 GA
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very Short
Reloading Speed: Medium
item_shotgunHandmade.desc: A makeshift 12 GA shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends. They call it a "Drobulet" between each other.

item_shotgunHandmade_choke.name: Drobulet Shotgun (Vertical Choke)
item_shotgunHandmade_choke.short:
Type: Shotgun
Caliber: 12 GA
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very Short
Reloading Speed: Medium
Features: Vertical choke
item_shotgunHandmade_choke.desc: A makeshift 12 GA shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends. Additionally equipped with a vertical choke to increase effectiveness against tall and thin targets.

item_revolverSmall_dusters.name: EB "Bantam" Revolver
item_revolverSmall_dusters.short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Increased melee damage
item_revolverSmall_dusters.desc: A six-shot 8 mm revolver made by Eisenblut, improved by Kaiser's Friends for very close combat encounters.

item_revolverQuickReloadEightShot.name: EB "Tiszt" Award Revolver
item_revolverQuickReloadEightShot.short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 8 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: High
item_revolverQuickReloadEightShot.desc: A special modification of the 8 mm revolver manufactured by Eisenblut, used as decoration for personal service to the state, courage and high professionalism. In addition to artistic decoration, the revolver also received an eight-shot drum compatible with speed loading.

item_revolverQuickReload.name: EB "Vita" Police Revolver
item_revolverQuickReload.short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: High
item_revolverQuickReload.desc: A modified 8 mm revolver manufactured by Eisenblut, used by the Sophie Gendarmerie. Received a six-shot drum compatible with speed loading.

item_revolverSmall.name: EB "Zseb" Revolver
item_revolverSmall.short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: Low
item_revolverSmall.desc: One of the cheapest 8 mm revolvers you can find on the grey market. Production – Eisenblut; sales – virtually any arms dealer.

game_packedShotgunTurretT4DoubleBarrel_C.name: Experimental 2x70 mm Twin Shotgun Cannon Kit
game_packedShotgunTurretT4DoubleBarrel_C.short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 70 mm
Range: Short

State: Perfect

Features: Double-barreled
game_packedShotgunTurretT4DoubleBarrel_C.desc:
One gun is already good, but two is always better. An experimental twin 70 mm shotgun cannon, created by SGOW as an attempt to increase firepower and salvo weight without significantly increasing the dimensions of the turret. Named "Eight" internally for its specific appearance. Manufactured in a limited batch for field testing.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the factory.

Utilizes 70 mm shells.

game_packedAutoTurretT4Accelerating_Cont.name: Experimental 40 mm Autocannon Kit
game_packedAutoTurretT4Accelerating_Cont.short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 40 mm
Range: Medium

State: Perfect

Features: Heating increases the rate of fire. Overheating can cause it to jam.
game_packedAutoTurretT4Accelerating_Cont.desc:
A modified trigger mechanism, experimentation with materials and a little barrel cooling system wizardry, and a regular twin-barreled anti-aircraft gun gained the ability to increase its combat rate of fire from its own heating during firing. Be careful: watch the temperature!
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the laboratory.

Utilizes 40 mm shells.

game_packedTurretT4_RailGunContainer.name: Experimental 80 mm Railgun Kit
game_packedTurretT4_RailGunContainer.short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 80 mm
Range: Very High

State: Perfect

Features: The extremely high initial velocity of the shells allows for direct fire at any distance.
game_packedTurretT4_RailGunContainer.desc:
A naval cannon, retrofitted in the Neue Zukunft laboratories with an electromagnetic accelerator. It consumes a huge amount of energy, but allows you to forget about ballistics – even standard 80 mm shells receive such a high initial velocity that the cannon literally shoots "on target" at any distance.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the laboratory.

Utilizes 80 mm shells.

item_rifleRepeaterAperture.name: M82 "Aperture" Rifle
item_rifleRepeaterAperture.short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: High
Reloading speed: High
Features: Aperture sight
item_rifleRepeaterAperture.desc: The SGOW M82 9 mm revolver rifle with a modified aperture sight. Highly versatile like a Swiss Army knife. Quite slow when it comes to reloading. Mounted with the special sights that allow the shooter to cover longer distances with increased accuracy.

item_repeaterRifle.name: M82 Rifle
item_repeaterRifle.short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: High
Reloading Speed: Medium
item_repeaterRifle.desc: The SGOW M82 9 mm revolver rifle. Highly versatile like a Swiss Army knife. Quite slow when it comes to reloading.

item_shotgun.name: Pepper Mill Shotgun
item_shotgun.short:
Type: Shotgun
Caliber: 12 GA
Magazine: 3 rounds
Range: Very Short
Reloading Speed: Medium
item_shotgun.desc: The custom O'Donnel 12 GA shotgun that was called the "Pepper Mill" because of it rotating barrels. "Give 'Em Some Pepper!"

game_packedAutoTurretT3Container.name: Pristine 40 mm Autocannon Kit
game_packedAutoTurretT3Container.short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 40 mm
Range: Medium

State: Pristine

Features: May jam when overheated
game_packedAutoTurretT3Container.desc:
Some ingenious engineers at the station decided that this twin-barreled anti-aircraft cannon would work perfectly fine against ground targets as well. Because of the old barrel design, the cannon may overheat and jam if it shoots consecutively for too long.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the factory.

Utilizes 40 mm shells.

game_packedShotgunTurretT3Container.name: Pristine 70 mm Shotgun Cannon Kit
game_packedShotgunTurretT3Container.short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 70 mm
Range: Short

State: Pristine
game_packedShotgunTurretT3Container.desc:
A cannon designed for buckshot shells that disperse many small projectiles when fired. The armor plate mounted on the front of the turret will protect the cannon operator from most gunfire. It is highly lethal against infantry at close range. The projectiles are solid enough to deal some damage to structures as well.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the factory.

Utilizes 70 mm shells.

game_packedTurretT3Container.name: Pristine 80 mm Naval Cannon Kit
game_packedTurretT3Container.short:
Type: Artillery
Caliber: 80 mm
Range: High

State: Pristine
game_packedTurretT3Container.desc:
A naval cannon stripped from Sophie's military fleet tramplers by scavengers. Covers great distances but is quite hard to operate due to its slow rate of fire.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the factory.

Utilizes 80 mm shells.

Due to long-term storage in adverse conditions, it is slightly rusted, but can still be used for its intended purpose.

Utilizes 40 mm shells.

item_orbitalStrikeGun.desc: The portable sighting complex "Zeigefinger" of the orbital surveillance system "Bärenjäger" (aka "Berehynia"), developed by Neue Zukunft in cooperation with SGOW to help pioneers explore new worlds. Rumor has it that the system is still present in the orbit of Sophie.

item_antiReactorGun.name: The Great Silence
item_antiReactorGun.short:
Type: Experimental Equipment
Purpose: Anti-reactor rifle
Trigger: Hold to charge
Action: Emergency shutdown of reactors, motor-reactors, and any other kind of aurogen-based power plants
item_antiReactorGun.desc: A special tool designed to neutralize aurogen-based energy sources. Developed by Neue Zukunft as some kind of "fire extinguisher" capable of initiating an emergency shutdown of aurogen reactors that have gotten out of control. Thanks to the efforts of Kaiser's Friends, it was transformed into a futuristic anti-reactor rifle.

item_Old_JacketT3.short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 3
Features: Regenerates over time
item_Old_JacketT3.desc: The standard armor of combat sailors and field officers of the Kaiser's fleet. The breastplate can reflect even the sun's rays. In it, you will be the most stylish Galician <s>marauder</s> scientist of all! And definitely the most resilient.

item_containerBox_1L.short:

Purpose: Storage and transportation
Features: Suitable for almost all types of cargo
item_containerBox_1L.desc: A standard wooden box suitable for storing and carrying literally anything that fits in it.

item_foodCanOrig.name: Canned Food
item_foodCanOrig.short:
Type: Food
Purpose: When placed in the trampler's fridge or any other storage, allows for quick respawning.
item_foodCanOrig.desc: The amount of food in the fridge is the number of respawns available for the crew.

item_rifleMusketClip.name: KF886/9R "Mehrzel" Repeater
item_rifleMusketClip.short:

Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: High
Reloading Speed: High
item_rifleMusketClip.desc: A field modification of a 9 mm breechloader by Kaiser's Friends as an attempt to convert a mass-produced single-shot musket into a magazine-fed rifle. Although a fairly successful modification, it was not widely used due to its excessive complexity.

item_medkit.short:
Type: Medical Supplies
Purpose: Quick restoration of health
Features: Allows for full restoration
item_medkit.desc: Whether it's a critical wound or a small scratch, the MedKit will fix it in no time.

item_multiTool.name: Multi-Tool
item_multiTool.short:
Type: Gear
Purpose: Quick on-site repairs
item_multiTool.desc: Your portable repair tool. Fixes small problems and most critical malfunctions. Too small for big renovations.

item_boostedEnergyBarV2.name: NZ Mk3 Impure Energy Rod
item_boostedEnergyBarV2.short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
Features: Short-term increase in trampler speed (huge)
item_boostedEnergyBarV2.desc:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
Makes your trampler go a bit faster for a short time thanks to the additives that give the motor-reactor a short burst of extra energy right after the rod is activated.

item_Jacket.name: Old Smuggler's Jacket
item_Jacket.short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 1
Features: Regenerates over time
item_Jacket.desc: The leather is sturdy enough to save you from a shot or two.

item_jacket.name: Old Smuggler's Jacket
item_jacket.short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 1
Features: Regenerates over time
item_jacket.desc: The leather is sturdy enough to save you from a shot or two.

item_shotgun_Ranged.name: Pepper Mill Shotgun
item_shotgun_Ranged.desc: The custom O'Donnel 12 GA shotgun that was called the "Pepper Mill" because of it rotating barrels. "Give 'Em Some Pepper!"

item_sniperRifle_Melee.name: Petros Rifle Stock
item_sniperRifle_Melee.desc: Bartka "Petros" sniper rifle stock. For situations when a rifle scope becomes a microscope.

item_sniperRifle_ironSights_Melee.name: Petros Rifle Stock
item_sniperRifle_ironSights_Melee.desc: Bartka "Petros" bolt-action rifle stock. Where's my bayonet...

item_sniperRifle_ironSights_silencer_Mel.name: Petros Rifle Stock
item_sniperRifle_ironSights_silencer_Mel.desc: Bartka "Petros" bolt-action rifle stock. For situations when even a silencer is too loud.

item_sniperRifle_silencer_Melee.name: Petros Rifle Stock
item_sniperRifle_silencer_Melee.desc: Bartka "Petros" bolt-action rifle stock. For situations when even a silencer is too loud and the target is too close.

item_revolverQuickReload_Melee.name: Police Revolver Handle
item_revolverQuickReload_Melee.desc: Good and reliable. You can always stop a crime with it.

item_JacketT2.name: SGOW SW.52 Body Armor (decommissioned)
item_JacketT2.short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 2
Features: Regenerates over time
item_JacketT2.desc: A well-worn breastplate, quilted jacket, and stylish belt – it immediately becomes clear that the wearer is not only ready for battle, but has already been through many.

item_jacketT2.name: SGOW SW.52 Body Armor (decommissioned)
item_jacketT2.short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 2
Features: Regenerates over time
item_jacketT2.desc: A well-worn breastplate, quilted jacket, and stylish belt – it immediately becomes clear that the wearer is not only ready for battle, but has already been through many.

item_repairKit.name: Repair Kit
item_repairKit.short:
Type: Tool
Purpose: Quick on-site repairs
Features: Allows for major repairs and restoration of destroyed trampler compartments
item_repairKit.desc: If you've noticed that your trampler has more holes than it has walls, this is the right tool to use.

item_revolverSmall_Melee.name: Revolver Handle
item_revolverSmall_Melee.desc: Good and reliable. You can always hit them with it.

item_smokeGrenade_Melee.name: RG79s Mace
item_smokeGrenade_Melee.desc: A grenade can be a blunt weapon, yes.

item_rocketLauncher_Ranged.name: RW1 Rocket Launcher
item_rocketLauncher_Ranged.desc: The Raketenwerfer 1 is one of the secret prototypes built by the Kaiser's SGOW engineers on Sophie. Unfortunately, it never reached Earth -– the entire batch was "lost" during the mass evacuation.

item_grenadeContactEMP.name: Spark Contact EMP Grenade
item_grenadeContactEMP.short:
Type: Grenade
Fuse: Contact
Damage: High

Features: Creates an electromagnetic wave that overloads and shuts down aurogen reactors
item_grenadeContactEMP.desc: The body of an HG-6 grenade with a modified warhead. The correct ratio of coral dust and crystallized aurogen reacts upon exploding and creates a small electromagnetic pulse. Most aurogen machinery is unable to withstand the load of such a pulse and shuts down in emergency to avoid burnout.

item_grenadeContactEMP_Ranged.name: Spark Contact EMP Grenade
item_grenadeContactEMP_Ranged.desc: The body of an HG-6 grenade with a modified warhead. The correct ratio of coral dust and crystallized aurogen reacts upon exploding and creates a small electromagnetic pulse. Most aurogen machinery is unable to withstand the load of such a pulse and shuts down in emergency to avoid burnout.

item_antiReactorGun_Ranged.name: The Great Silence
item_antiReactorGun_Ranged.desc: A special tool designed to neutralize aurogen-based energy sources. Developed by Neue Zukunft as some kind of "fire extinguisher" capable of initiating an emergency shutdown of aurogen reactors that have gotten out of control. Thanks to the efforts of Kaiser's Friends, it was transformed into a futuristic anti-reactor rifle.

item_shotgunTriplet_Ranged.name: Triplet Shotgun
item_shotgunTriplet_Ranged.desc: O'Donnell's exclusive 12-gauge shotgun, nicknamed the "Triplet" because it fires in bursts from all three barrels at once. Blows away everything in its path (literally!).

item_instantRepairPatch.name: V1 Repair Patch
item_instantRepairPatch.short:
Type: Tool
Purpose: Quick on-site repairs
Features: Near-instant pointwise repairs; one-time use
item_instantRepairPatch.desc:
Primarily designed to quickly repair hull breaches on Imperial submarines, but in practice has proven extremely useful in repairing most types of integrity faults.
Manufactured by SGOW.

item_revolverQuickReloadEightShot_Ranged.name: EB "Tiszt" Award Revolver
item_revolverQuickReloadEightShot_Ranged.desc: A special modification of the 8 mm revolver manufactured by Eisenblut, used as decoration for personal service to the state, courage and high professionalism. In addition to artistic decoration, the revolver also received an eight-shot drum compatible with speed loading.

item_revolverQuickReloadEightShot_Melee.name: Award Revolver Handle
item_revolverQuickReloadEightShot_Melee.desc: Luxurious, but still reliable. You can always show off to others with this one.

item_grappleGunAmmo.name: 90 mm Grapple-Harpoon
item_grappleGunAmmo.short:
Type: Harpoons
Caliber: 90 mm
Suitable for: Harpoon cannons
Features: Able to grab items without damaging them

item_backpackSmall.name: Small Backpack
item_backpackSmall.short:
Type: Gear
Purpose: Extra space to carry things hands-free
Capacity: X slots
item_backpackSmall.desc: Your small yet capable adventure companion: it holds just what you need – from weapons to treasures!

item_backpackLarge.name: Large Backpack
item_backpackLarge.short:
Type: Gear
Purpose: Extra space to carry things hands-free
Capacity: X slots
item_backpackLarge.desc: One of those huge and bulky adventure companions that can hold more than you usually need – from weapons to treasure! If you can lift it.

item_shotgunTurretAmmo_smoke.name: 70 mm Smoke Shell
item_shotgunTurretAmmo_smoke.short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 70 mm
Suitable for: Shotgun cannons
Features: Creates smoke cover
item_shotgunTurretAmmo_smoke.desc: A shotgun turret shell casing filled with a special mixture that, when detonated, creates a huge cloud of thick smoke. Not intended to cause damage, but can become a key tactical tool that can change the outcome of a battle. A prototype from Neue Zukunft.

item_turretAmmo_delayedDetonation.name: 80 mm Proximity Fuse Shell
item_turretAmmo_delayedDetonation.short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
Features: Proximity detonation and easier aiming
item_turretAmmo_delayedDetonation.desc: A rather unique invention consisting of a conventional 80 mm cannon shell combined with a proximity fuse. When fired, the shell explodes at a distance sufficient to damage the target, which greatly simplifies aiming – no direct hit required! Invented by some unknown engineer who definitely didn't blow himself up in the process of creating it.

item_turretAmmo_EMP.name: 80 mm EMP Shell
item_turretAmmo_EMP.short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
Features: Creates an electromagnetic wave capable of shutting down reactors
item_turretAmmo_EMP.desc: One of the Neue Zukunft prototypes. The warhead of a standard 80 mm artillery shell is reinforced with stabilized aurogen crystals. Deals less damage compared to the base shell, but is capable of disabling all aurogen-based machinery in the area of impact.

item_smallCannonAmmo_lowRecoil.name: 40 mm Low-Recoil Shell
item_smallCannonAmmo_lowRecoil.short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 40 mm
Suitable for: Autocannons
Features: Reduced recoil
item_smallCannonAmmo_lowRecoil.desc: A 40 mm shell with a slightly altered powder formula, providing reduced recoil at the cost of a lower initial projectile velocity. Even though the projectile is slower, it still remains deadly in close- and medium-range combat encounters. Manufactured by SGOW engineers to extend the service life of older versions of the fleet's autocannons, which had significantly less efficient recoil mechanisms compared to their newer models.

item_unstableEnergyBar.name: KF Mk 9000 Unstable Energy Rod
item_unstableEnergyBar.short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Significantly boosts trampler's speed for a short duration
item_unstableEnergyBar.desc: Regular Energy Bar from NZ that was tampered with by KF engineers (if you can call them that). Tampering included adding different compounds to it and hoping that it won't explode. As a result you have modified energy rod that will provide a more powerfull boost to your reactor at cost of reduced energy capacity. Also it's not called unstable for nothing, even minor kinetic damage will release all the energy from the rod to the surrounding area jamming all aurogen based machinery

item_ironcladContainer40mm.name: Ironclad's Cargo Box
item_ironcladContainer40mm.short: A crate that belonged to an Ironclad trampler.

item_ironcladContainer70mm.name: Ironclad's Cargo Box
item_ironcladContainer70mm.short: A crate that belonged to an Ironclad trampler.

item_ironcladContainer80mm.name: Ironclad's Cargo Box
item_ironcladContainer80mm.short: A crate that belonged to an Ironclad trampler.

item_alloySteel.name: Alloy Steel
item_alloySteel.short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, Tech Tree
item_alloySteel.desc:
The latest development in the world of metallurgy, this steel with the addition of alloying elements allows it to withstand much higher temperatures and be more resistant to physical damage. It was thanks to this development that Ironclad tramplers gained their ability to land directly from orbit.
Other metals simply wouldn't be able to withstand such temperatures and stress from a fall.

item_rifleMusketVeteran.name: M1866/9 "Pioneer" Breechloader
item_rifleMusketVeteran.short:
Type: Single-Shot Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: Low
item_rifleMusketVeteran.desc: A special decorated model of M1866/9 Breechloading Musket, a collaboration between Bartka and Kaiser's Firends, curated personaly by Vasil Cresalo. Issued as a trophy weapon specifically to the first wave of scavengers that have layed the first trails and were the first to see the Sophie in its new look.

item_rifleMusketVeteran_Ranged.name: M1866/9 "Pioneer" Breechloader
item_rifleMusketVeteran_Ranged.desc: A special decorated model of M1866/9 Breechloading Musket, a collaboration between Bartka and Kaiser's Firends, curated personaly by Vasil Cresalo. Issued as a trophy weapon specifically to the first wave of scavengers that have layed the first trails and were the first to see the Sophie in its new look.

item_rifleMusketVeteran_Melee.name: M1866/9 "Pioneer" Stock
item_rifleMusketVeteran_Melee.desc: I wouldn't have to do it this way if I had a bayonet...

item_weirdCoral.name: Weird Coral
item_weirdCoral.short:
Type: Raw Material?
Purpose: Crafting, Tech Tree
item_weirdCoral.desc: A weirdly shaped coral that emits some brightly colored fumes, similar to those often seen on Upiórs. Inhaling these fumes would probably not be the best idea...

walker_compCruise_Medium_Metal_1x3.name: Cruising Accelerator
walker_compCruise_Medium_Metal_1x3.desc:
Dimensions: 1x3

An engineering marvel of the Austro-Hungarian Empire. Significantly increases the trampler's top speed ​​and acceleration for a short period of time. Due to its experimental design and rather fragile construction, it is prone to malfunction and will require manual restarting from even the lightest impact.

walker_compSteering_Long_Wood_1x2.name: KF "Kormylo" Wheelhouse
walker_compSteering_Long_Wood_1x2.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

The helm stripped from the civilian vessel and mounted on the Trampler Deck. One of the basic modifications that Kaiser's Friends Gang can provide for the Scavengers that work with them.

walker_compWeapon_AutoCannon_Frame_1x1.name: KF "Nest" 40 mm Autocannon
walker_compWeapon_AutoCannon_Frame_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A twin-barreled autocannon installed in the modified frame deck. It provides enhanced defensive capabilities by improving the ergonomics. One of the basic modifications that Kaiser's Friends provides for the scavengers who work with them.
Utilizes 40 mm shells.

walker_compWeapon_Shotgun_Frame_1x1.name: KF "Nest" 70 mm Shotgun Cannon
walker_compWeapon_Shotgun_Frame_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A shotgun cannon installed on a modified frame deck. It provides enhanced defensive capabilities by improving the ergonomics. One of the basic modifications that Kaiser's Friends provides for the scavengers who work for them.
Utilizes 70 mm shells.

walker_compWeapon_Cannon_Frame_1x1.name: KF "Nest" 80 mm Cannon
walker_compWeapon_Cannon_Frame_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A naval cannon installed on a modified frame deck. It provides enhanced defensive capabilities by improving the ergonomics. One of the basic modifications that Kaiser's Friends provides for the scavengers who work with them.
Utilizes 80 mm shells.

walker_compDeck_TurretSlot_FrameCMetal_1.name: KF "Nest" Framed Armored Turret Deck
walker_compDeck_TurretSlot_FrameCMetal_1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

The lower support of a gun carriage, mounted on a reinforced deck. Designed to accommodate the full range of available artillery weapons. Engineers from the Kaiser's Friends gang additionally equipped it with a supporting frame, which allows other compartments to be installed on it, and armored railings to provide cover during gunfights.

walker_compWeapon_TurretSlot_Frame_1x1.name: KF "Nest" Framed Turret Deck
walker_compWeapon_TurretSlot_Frame_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

The lower support of the gun carriage, mounted on a reinforced deck. Designed to accommodate the full range of available artillery weapons.. Engineers from the Kaiser's Friends gang additionally equipped it with a supporting frame, which allows other compartments to be installed on it.

walker_compWeapon_BattleRam_2x2.name: KF "Prolomnyk" Battering Ram
walker_compWeapon_BattleRam_2x2.desc:
Dimensions: 2x2

The bow section stripped from the icebreaker. You might ask whether a tropical planet had ice. Who knows?

walker_compCraftingUtility_Wood_2x1.name: KF Sewing Workshop
walker_compCraftingUtility_Wood_2x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

Until recently, it was a typical sailmaker's workplace, designed for manufacturing and repairing sails and related accessories. Through the efforts of Kaiser's Friends, it has been converted into a more versatile and contemporary sewing workshop, ready to repair and create new fabric and leather products of any size and style during long-term expeditions.

walker_compChassis_Wide4_MetalHole_4x3.name: KF-B "Hole" Middling Chassis
walker_compChassis_Wide4_MetalHole_4x3.desc:
Dimensions: 4x3

Kaiser's Friends mechanics found out that the chassis can function perfectly well without its central section. However, it takes a few more materials to hold it together. They made sure to fully utilize this newfound discovery on every chassis variation they could lay their hands on.

Dimensions: 5x3

Dimensions: 4x4

walker_compChassis_Small4_MetalHole_3x3.name: KF-Q "Well" Small Chassis
walker_compChassis_Small4_MetalHole_3x3.desc:
Dimensions: 3x3

Kaiser's Friends mechanics found out that the chassis can function perfectly well without its central section. However, it takes a few more materials to hold it together. They made sure to fully utilize this newfound discovery on every chassis variation they could lay their hands on.

walker_compReactor_Round_Wood_2x1.name: NZ AzE80 Motor-Reactor, Covered
walker_compReactor_Round_Wood_2x1.desc:
Dimensions: 2x2

The heart of the trampler. Provides power to all compartments of the trampler and its chassis. Created by Neue Zukunft, the motor-reactor converts aurogen from energy rods into huge amounts of energy. Destroying the reactor will cause a chain reaction throughout the whole trampler, detonating most of its compartments and rendering it completely inoperable. This model is enclosed in a solid compartment to protect it from any debris falling on the reactor during construction work.

walker_compReactor_Long_Wood_1x3.name: NZ AzE80 Motor-Reactor, Covered
walker_compReactor_Long_Wood_1x3.desc:
Dimensions: 1x3

The heart of the trampler. Provides power to all compartments of the trampler and its chassis. Created by Neue Zukunft, the motor-reactor converts aurogen from energy rods into huge amounts of energy. Destroying the reactor will cause a chain reaction throughout the whole trampler, detonating most of its compartments and rendering it completely inoperable. This model is enclosed in a solid compartment to protect it from any debris falling on the reactor during construction work.

walker_compReactor_Round_Metal_2x1.name: NZ AzE81 Motor-Reactor, Armored
walker_compReactor_Round_Metal_2x1.desc:
Dimensions: 2x2

The heart of the trampler. Provides power to all compartments of the trampler and its chassis. Created by Neue Zukunft, the motor-reactor converts aurogen from energy rods into huge amounts of energy. Destroying the reactor will cause a chain reaction throughout the whole trampler, detonating most of its compartments and rendering it completely inoperable. This model features additional armor plates installed at Seearsenal Neues Triest factories, allowing this compartment to be installed on Imperial military tramplers.

walker_compReactor_Round_Open_2x1.name: NZ AzE81L Deck Motor-Reactor, Rounded
walker_compReactor_Round_Open_2x1.desc:
Dimensions: 2x2

walker_compReactor_Round_Framed_2x1.name: NZ AzE81L Motor-Reactor, Framed Rounded
walker_compReactor_Round_Framed_2x1.desc:
Dimensions: 2x2

The heart of the trampler. Provides power to all compartments of the trampler and its chassis. Created by Neue Zukunft, the motor-reactor converts aurogen from energy rods into huge amounts of energy. Destroying the reactor will cause a chain reaction throughout the whole trampler, detonating most of its compartments and rendering it completely inoperable. It has been further modified by Kaiser's Friends to be able to carry other compartments on top of the frames installed on this compartment.

walker_compReactor_Long_Open_1x3.name: NZ AzE81S Deck Motor-Reactor, Long
walker_compReactor_Long_Open_1x3.desc:

walker_compReactor_Long_Framed_1x3.desc:
Dimensions: 1x3

Created by Neue Zukunft, the motor-reactor converts aurogen from energy rods into huge amounts of energy. Destroying the reactor will cause a chain reaction throughout the whole trampler, detonating most of its compartments and rendering it completely inoperable. It has been further modified by Kaiser's Friends to be able to carry other compartments on top of the frames installed on this compartment.

walker_compReactor_Long_Metal_1x3.name: NZ AzE82 Motor-Reactor, Armored
walker_compReactor_Long_Metal_1x3.desc:
Dimensions: 1x3

The heart of the trampler. Provides power to all compartments of the trampler and its chassis. Created by Neue Zukunft, the motor-reactor converts aurogen from energy rods into huge amounts of energy. Destroying the reactor will cause a chain reaction throughout the whole trampler, detonating most of its compartments and rendering it completely inoperable. This model features additional armor plates installed at Seearsenal Neues Triest factories, allowing this compartment to be installed on Imperial military tramplers.

walker_compMedical_Metal_1x1.name: NZ MAk-2 Medical Bay
walker_compMedical_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A matter enricher prototype from Neue Zukunft, designed to grow terrestrial plants that did not adapt well to growing in Sophie's ecosystem. Later, some curious marauders discovered that it can be used to heal even critical wounds. However, do not expect it to restore a lost limb or resurrect the dead; even innovative technology has its limitations.

walker_compEngine_Small_Metal_1x1.name: NZ Mb2k Maneuver Engine, Small
walker_compEngine_Small_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Specifically designed for small-sized tramplers operating in narrow places. Despite its small size, it is still able to moderately improve chassis maneuverability. It doesn't require an individual exhaust pipe.

walker_compEngine_Medium_Metal_1x2.name: NZ Mb3 Maneuver Engine, Medium
walker_compEngine_Medium_Metal_1x2.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

Used on heavy-duty transporters to improve chassis maneuverability when transporting extremely heavy loads. This model is increased in size and features a built-in exhaust pipe. These modifications are able to provide a considerable boost to chassis performance.

walker_compChassis_Large6_Metal_5x5.name: S.Trs "Albrecht" Royal Chassis
walker_compChassis_Large6_Metal_5x5.desc:
Dimensions: 5x5

Specially Designed by Seearsenal Neues Triest engineers for the "Albrecht" Military Trampler, a trampler named after Franz Joseph's nephew. It loses in maneuverability to any civilian model but can literally carry a military fort on itself.

walker_compChassis_Long8_Metal_4x6.name: S.Trs "Karl Ludvig" Royal Chassis
walker_compChassis_Long8_Metal_4x6.desc:
Dimensions: 4x6

Specially designed by Seearsenal Neues Triest engineers for the "Karl Ludvig" Flagman Trampler of Sophie's Military Fleet. It was named after Franz Joseph's brother. It loses in maneuverability to any civilian model but can literally carry a military fort on itself.

walker_compWeapon_AutoCannon_Open_1x1.name: S.Trs 40 mm Autocannon
walker_compWeapon_AutoCannon_Open_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Some ingenious engineers at the station decided that this twin-barreled anti-aircraft cannon would work perfectly fine against ground targets as well. Because of the old barrel design, the cannon may overheat and jam if it shoots consecutively for too long.
Utilizes 40 mm shells.

walker_compWeapon_AutoCannon_Open_2x1.name: S.Trs 40 mm Autocannon
walker_compWeapon_AutoCannon_Open_2x1.desc:
Dimensions: 2x1

Some ingenious engineers at the station decided that this twin-barreled anti-aircraft cannon will work perfectly fine against ground targets as well. Because of the old barrel design, the cannon may overheat and jam if it shoots consecutively for too long.
Utilizes 40 mm shells.

walker_compWeapon_Shotgun_Open_1x1.name: S.Trs 70 mm Shotgun Cannon
walker_compWeapon_Shotgun_Open_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

This cannon uses canister shots that will disperse into many small projectiles upon firing. The armor plate mounted on the front of the turret will protect the cannon operator from most gunfire. It is highly lethal against infantry at close range. The projectiles are solid enough to deal some damage to structures as well.
Utilizes 70 mm shells.

walker_compWeapon_Shotgun_Open_2x1.name: S.Trs 70 mm Shotgun Cannon
walker_compWeapon_Shotgun_Open_2x1.desc:
Dimensions: 2x1

This cannon uses canister shots that will disperse into many small projectiles upon firing. The armor plate mounted on the front of the turret will protect the cannon operator from most gunfire. It is highly lethal against infantry at close range. The projectiles are solid enough to deal some damage to structures as well.
Utilizes 70 mm shells.

walker_compWeapon_Cannon_Open_1x1.name: S.Trs 80 mm Cannon
walker_compWeapon_Cannon_Open_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Naval Cannon stripped from Sophie's Military Fleet Tramplers by the scavengers. Covers a great distances but is quite hard to operate due to its slow rate of fire.
Utilizes 80 mm shells.

walker_compWeapon_Cannon_Open_2x1.name: S.Trs 80 mm Cannon
walker_compWeapon_Cannon_Open_2x1.desc:
Dimensions: 2x1

A naval cannon stripped from Sophie's military fleet tramplers by scavengers. Covers great distances but is quite hard to operate due to its slow rate of fire.
Utilizes 80 mm shells.

walker_compBalcony_Middle_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions:1x1

walker_compBalcony_InnerCorner_Armored_1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

walker_compBalcony_InnerCorner_Metal_1x1.name: S.Trs Armored Balcony, Inner Corner
walker_compBalcony_InnerCorner_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

walker_compDeck_SquareH_Armored_1x1.name: S.Trs Armored Deck
walker_compDeck_SquareH_Armored_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Platform that improves the trampler's ergonomics. Provides more comfortable navigation on the roofs of compartments. Equipped with railings to prevent the crew from falling overboard or unauthorized persons from entering. Can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments. A militarized version of the S&H design, improved with a reinforced floor and armored railings to provide cover during gunfights.

walker_compDeck_Square_FrameArmored_1x1.name: S.Trs Armored Frame
walker_compDeck_Square_FrameArmored_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

An additional load-bearing frame that allows the placement of decks without blocking the space below them. More lightweight than solid compartments but more fragile. A militarized version of the S&H design, improved with a reinforced floor and armored railings to provide cover during gunfights.

walker_compWeapon_TurretSlot_MetalOpen_1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

walker_compWeapon_TurretSlot_MetalCorner.desc:

walker_compCorridor_Small_Metal_1x1.name: S.Trs Auxiliary Corridor
walker_compCorridor_Small_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A compartment that can be installed to improve the trampler's ergonomics by creating more protected passages between functional compartments. Quite fragile.

walker_compCaptainCrew_Metal_1x1.name: S.Trs Captain's Cabin
walker_compCaptainCrew_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1+

A crew compartment specially designed for the trampler's captain. The standard equipment includes a personal refrigerator and reinforced armor. 
The cabin also houses the Trampler Ownership Device, "IO". Crew access to doors and other trampler functions is granted and overwritten exclusively through this device. This modification of the compartment was designed for warships; therefore, it is equipped with additional armor.

walker_compCargo_LargeL_Metal_1x2.name: S.Trs Cargo Bay, L-Shape
walker_compCargo_LargeL_Metal_1x2.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

A modified version of the S&H cargo bay design, reinforced by armored walls. Even sturdier, but heavier. Was used on military cruisers to transport valuable cargo, such as weapons, spare parts, and even top-secret prototypes.

walker_compCargo_LargeP_Metal_1x2.name: S.Trs Cargo Bay, Parallel
walker_compCargo_LargeP_Metal_1x2.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

walker_compCargo_LargeU_Metal_1x2.desc:

walker_compCargo_Large_Metal_1x1.name: S.Trs Cargo Compartment, Large
walker_compCargo_Large_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A compartment designed for transporting small loads. Ensures that all items placed on its shelves will remain intact during Trampler Deployment and Evacuation. Can hold off a burglar but won't protect your belongings from an explosion. Provides maximum capacity at the cost of poor ergonomics.

walker_compCargo_SmallM_Metal_1x1.name: S.Trs Cargo Compartment, Medium
walker_compCargo_SmallM_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A compartment designed for transporting small loads. Has noticeably more armor compared to S&H cargo decks. Ensures that all items placed on its shelves will remain intact during Trampler Deployment and Evacuation. Can hold off a burglar but won't protect your loot from an explosion.

walker_compCargo_SmallP_Metal_1x1.name: S.Trs Cargo Compartment, Small

walker_compArmor_Spot_Metal_1x1.name: S.Trs HA Armor Plate
walker_compArmor_Spot_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Armor plate scavenged from Imperial cruisers. Strong enough to withstand a couple of hits. Sloped to improve protection and the likelihood of ricochet. Due to the design specifics, it is not subject to field repairs.

walker_compArmor_Framed_Metal_1x1.name: S.Trs HAs Framed Armor Plate
walker_compArmor_Framed_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Armor plate scavenged from Imperial cruisers. Strong enough to withstand a couple of hits. Sloped to improve protection and the likelihood of ricochet. Due to the design specifics, it is not subject to field repairs. A frame, mounted around the armor plate, allows for another compartment to be installed above it.

walker_compArmor_FramedReverse_Metal_1x1.name: S.Trs HAs-R Framed Armor Plate
walker_compArmor_FramedReverse_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Armor plate scavenged from Imperial cruisers. Strong enough to withstand a couple of hits. Sloped to improve protection and the likelihood of ricochet. Due to the design specifics, it is not subject to field repairs. This placement provides an additional angle, increasing the chance of ricochet from new directions.

walker_compCrew_Medium_Metal_1x2.name: S.Trs K81v Crew Cabin, 2 People
walker_compCrew_Medium_Metal_1x2.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

These cabins were designed to sustain a trampler crew during long journeys. Every new shift starts here. Provides all the necessary means of comfort, including a refrigerator to store provisions and a ventilation system that provides improved air circulation on hot days.

walker_compSteering_Long_Metal_1x2.name: S.Trs K81v Pilot Bridge
walker_compSteering_Long_Metal_1x2.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

S&H engineers have combined every trampler movement control into one module, making it a universal control point. Marching, turning, sidestep, emergency brake. They even installed a horn! This modification has additional layers of armor and was commissioned by the Imperial Army for installation on Imperial military tramplers.

walker_compSteering_Round_Metal_2x1.name: S.Trs K82v Pilot Bridge
walker_compSteering_Round_Metal_2x1.desc:
Dimensions: 2x1

This modification has additional layers of armor and was commissioned by the Imperial Army for installation on Imperial military tramplers.

walker_compSpecial_Embrasure_Metal_1x1.name: S.Trs M78v Embrasure
walker_compSpecial_Embrasure_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

The basic embrasure that was installed on most Imperial military tramplers in Sophie's military fleet. It provides decent cover for a soldier inside along with a good arc of fire to defend the trampler from approaching infantry.

walker_compCrew_Small_Metal_1x1.name: S.Trs MB75 Crew Cabin, Single
walker_compCrew_Small_Metal_1x1.desc:

Provides all the necessary means of comfort, including a refrigerator to store provisions and a ventilation system that provides improved air circulation on hot days. The compact model is designed for personal use.

walker_compCrew_Large_Metal_2x2.desc:

Provides all the necessary means of comfort, including a refrigerator to store provisions and a ventilation system that provides improved air circulation on hot days. This particular design features increased room capacity and can sustain up to four crew members.

walker_compCrafting_Open_1x1.name: S&H Armaments Workbench
walker_compCrafting_Open_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Such workshops are an essential part of warships, where they are used to maintain the crew's weapons and ammunition. It has been refitted by scavengers into a full-fledged armory to allow the construction of weapons and ammunition from even the most primitive components found on the planet during expeditions. You might ask, "Why didn't they just use it on the space station?" Well, you can check the Saint Cristopher Station's "Rules of Habitat and Machinery Maintenance" Chapter 5, Article 32, Lines 24 to 32.

walker_compWeapon_AutoCannon_Metal_1x1.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

One of the prototypes created by SGOW for the flagship Imperial cruisers. It combines the firepower of deck artillery with a protected gun mount to shield its crew from enemy shots and explosions. However, such protection comes at a price: the gun has a smaller arc of fire compared to the deck model, it costs the same as a small ship, and refuses to work without external power.
Utilizes 40 mm shells.
